title: ABUS Padlock brass 60/50HB50 - high shackle - for doors, gates, cabinets, bags, suitcases and much more. - Brass lock body - hardened steel shackle - ABUS security level 5
features: Flexible applications: use to secure loop cables or around doors, gates, cupboards, lockers, toolboxes, basement windows, sheds, switchgear or barriers
Durable and stable: lock body made of solid brass, hardened steel shackle and internal parts made of corrosion-free materials
Easy to use: thanks to the automatic locking mechanism, it can be locked without a key by pressing down on the handle
Classic lock: ABUS security level 5 - Weight 253 g - Width 48 mm, height 76 mm, depth 15. 5 mm, shackle diameter 7 mm, clear shackle height 32 mm, clear shackle width 25. 5 mm
Safe, reliable and stable. This is what the name ABUS stands for. Whether it's home protection, property security or mobile security: ABUS sets the standards
description: Product description ABUS padlock 60/50HB50 Our brass padlock 60 is one of our classic locks for a wide range of applications. The solid brass lock body and hardened steel shackle ensure the lock's durability. A precision pin cylinder is used on the inside and the paracentric key profile provides increased protection against tampering. The lock is locked without a key by pressing down the shackle. There is a wide range of possible applications: you can use it to secure loop cables, for example, or to secure doors, gates, cupboards, lockers, toolboxes, cellar windows, sheds, switchgear or barriers. Padlocks from ABUS - always the right solution ABUS offers a wide range of padlocks for every type of property. A large selection of colors, various locking mechanisms and different materials ensure that everyone will find the right padlock. Whether gates, doors or bags, the locks reliably secure your property. Further product benefits: ➦ Lock body made from solid brass ➦ Internal parts made from corrosion-free materials ➦ Hardened steel shackle ➦ Precision pin cylinder ➦ Automatic locking: Locking without key by pressing down the shackle ➦ Two keys included Brand description ABUS - innovative security solutions since 1924 The story of ABUS is the story of a company that has been dedicated to a single mission from the very beginning: To make people's lives safer - at home and on the move. What once began with the production of padlocks in the company's own forge has become a global company with leading expertise in the field of security. Customer-centric, innovative and reliable, we meet security needs and have been inspiring people with our products for generations.
